name.value: We bring the awesome Git SCM to Windows

value.value: We bring the awesome Git SCM to Windows

name.value: Git for Windows focuses on offering a lightweight, native set of tools that bring the full feature set of the

value.value: Git for Windows focuses on offering a lightweight, native set of tools that bring the full feature set of the

name.value: to Windows while providing appropriate user interfaces for experienced Git users and novices alike.

value.value: to Windows while providing appropriate user interfaces for experienced Git users and novices alike.

name.value: Git for Windows provides a BASH emulation used to run Git from the command line. *NIX users should feel right at home, as the BASH emulation behaves just like the "git" command in LINUX and UNIX environments.

value.value: Git for Windows provides a BASH emulation used to run Git from the command line. *NIX users should feel right at home, as the BASH emulation behaves just like the "git" command in LINUX and UNIX environments.

name.value: As Windows users commonly expect graphical user interfaces, Git for Windows also provides the Git GUI, a powerful alternative to Git BASH, offering a graphical version of just about every Git command line function, as well as comprehensive visual diff tools.

value.value: As Windows users commonly expect graphical user interfaces, Git for Windows also provides the Git GUI, a powerful alternative to Git BASH, offering a graphical version of just about every Git command line function, as well as comprehensive visual diff tools.

name.value: Simply right-click on a folder in Windows Explorer to access the BASH or GUI.

value.value: Simply right-click on a folder in Windows Explorer to access the BASH or GUI.

name.value: If you've noticed a bug or simply have an idea that you'd like to see become real, why not work on it? Bug reports and feature requests are typically submitted to the issue tracker on our GitHub repository.
